\textbf{Supplementary Table 8 | Formal hypothesis tests with BH-FDR correction.} One-sided bootstrap p-values are reported for primary flattening-drop tests; two-sided bootstrap p-values are reported for sham-control tests. Benjamini--Hochberg correction was applied separately to the 31 primary flattening comparisons and 28 sham comparisons at $q=0.05$.
